description_long: This kiosk consists of two main sections: a larger unit with a wide, flat front display and a smaller, three-panel section adjacent to it. The main section features a prominent printed sign with graphics and text, likely for advertising or informational purposes, mounted above a counter or shelf area. The three-panel section appears to be modular, each panel having a clear or light-colored surface, possibly for displaying posters or menus, and a small attached box on the rightmost panel. The structure is primarily constructed from metal framing with solid panels, and the base includes shelving or storage space. The overall design is open, with no visible doors or enclosed spaces, and the surfaces are smooth and hard. The kiosk is utilitarian, suitable for outdoor or semi-outdoor urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or transit stations.
description: A dual-section kiosk with a wide main display and a modular three-panel side unit, featuring printed signage and open shelving. The structure is made of metal and solid panels, with a modern, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main display with printed signage, open shelving below, and the adjacent three-panel section with a small attached box.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of both the main and side sections, highlighting the depth of the shelving and the panel arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain backs of both sections, with no signage or openings visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side profile and the attached box on the rightmost panel of the three-panel section.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign mounted above the main counter, featuring graphics and text
attribute_roof_design: flat roof with no overhangs or decorative elements, constructed from solid panels
